lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Welcome, Effendi!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go in?

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Come now Effendi, to pass you must tell me a story, one of grand heroics!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...And then I pulled the goblin mail from the corpse, but it didn't fit, so I dropped it.

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: You thought that was a story of heroics?! Come back when you have something worth telling.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...And then I cut her head off, so as to make sure she was dead!

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Amazing! A story well worth telling! Please Effendi, enter at your leisure.

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Of course Effendi! You have proved yourself worthy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Me? I am Haris! Owner of the area north of here, it is has great resources, I assure you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You own the land? Who did you buy it from?

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Buy? Oh no no no. Do you see this sword, Effendi?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do.

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Well then, that is why it is mine! Hahaha.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, so do I pay a toll? 10 coins should do, right?

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Not quite, while gold can get you to many places, I seek stories of heroics, for my land is only for the worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is the story behind your sword one of heroics?

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: I promise you, the monkey I took it from was big! Hahaha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Farewell, Effendi!

sections.title: If the player tries to enter the Corsair Cove Resource Area without  granted access

lines.speaker: Haris
lines.text: Hey! I didn't say you could go in there!
